name: Sushi Chef
author: Poki
description: Sushi Chef is a Match-3 puzzle game. You are a Sushi Chef and your customers want to order a specific type of sushi in threefold. Make sure to serve your customers in time or you will be fired by your boss. How to play: Drag the sushi across the board to make sets of three. If you can't find a combination of 3 that your customers want, first try to swap some other sushi around. About the creator: Sushi Chef was created by RedFoc. They have also created Space Bubbles and the popular checkers.
